subject: URGENT: Your PayPal account has been suspended
body_text: Dear Customer, We have detected unusual activity on your PayPal account. Your account has been temporarily suspended. You must verify your identity immediately or your account will be permanently closed within 24 hours. Click here to confirm your account details and restore access. Do not ignore this message.

subject: Apple ID: Verify your account now
body_text: Your Apple ID has been locked due to suspicious signin attempts. To unlock your account, you must verify your information immediately. Failure to verify within 48 hours will result in permanent account suspension. Enter your password and billing information to restore access.

subject: You have won $1000000 lottery prize
body_text: Congratulations! You have been selected as the winner of our international lottery. You have won ONE MILLION DOLLARS. To claim your prize you must send a processing fee of $500 via wire transfer or gift card. Reply with your bank account and routing number to claim your winnings immediately.

subject: IRS Tax Fraud Alert - Immediate Action Required
body_text: WARNING: Our records indicate you owe back taxes. Legal action and arrest warrant will be issued within 24 hours unless you pay immediately. Purchase $500 in iTunes gift cards and call us with the redemption codes to avoid criminal charges and deportation.

subject: Your Microsoft account password expires today
body_text: Action Required: Your Microsoft Office 365 password is expiring today. Click the link below to update your password within 2 hours or you will be locked out. Enter your current username and password to proceed.

subject: CRITICAL: Amazon order cancelled - verify payment
body_text: Your Amazon order #1234567 has been cancelled due to a payment issue. Your credit card was declined. Please update your credit card information and billing address immediately to avoid losing your order. This link expires in 1 hour.

subject: FedEx Shipment Notification - Action Required
body_text: Your FedEx package is on hold due to incomplete address information. To release your package you must pay a $3.50 customs fee and confirm your home address, date of birth, and last 4 digits of your SSN.

subject: LinkedIn: Your account will be deactivated
body_text: Your LinkedIn account shows unusual signin activity from an unauthorized location. Confirm your identity by entering your username and password at the link below. Account will be deactivated in 24 hours if not verified.

subject: Dropbox: Important document shared with you
body_text: Hi, A confidential document has been shared with you. Click below to access the document. You will need to enter your email and password to view it.

subject: Zoom Meeting Invitation - Click to Join
body_text: You have been invited to an important Zoom meeting. Click the link below to join. You may need to update your Zoom client and enter your work email and password.

subject: DocuSign: Sign your document immediately
body_text: Please review and sign your document. You must sign within 24 hours or the contract will be void and legal action may be taken. Enter your email credentials to access the document.

subject: Your bank account has been locked
body_text: URGENT: We have detected unauthorized access to your Bank of America account. Your account has been locked for your protection. Login immediately to verify your identity and restore access or you will lose your funds.

subject: HR Department: Your salary has been updated
body_text: Please find attached your updated salary breakdown and direct deposit form. Fill out the attached form with your bank account and routing number and return to HR.

subject: Netflix: Payment failed - Update billing info
body_text: Your Netflix subscription payment failed. To avoid interruption of your service please update your credit card information immediately. This must be done within 24 hours.

subject: Your email storage is full - Upgrade now
body_text: WARNING: Your email account is 99% full and will stop receiving messages. Enter your email password to upgrade your storage and prevent account deletion.

subject: Action Required: Verify your Chase account
body_text: Chase Bank: We have detected suspicious activity on your account. Please verify your debit card number, PIN, and social security number to confirm your identity and avoid account closure.

subject: You have a pending wire transfer waiting
body_text: You have an unclaimed wire transfer of $8,500 waiting for you from an international client. To claim the funds you must provide your bank account number and pay a $200 processing fee.

subject: ACCOUNT SUSPENDED: Verify immediately!!!
body_text: YOUR ACCOUNT HAS BEEN COMPROMISED!!! UNAUTHORIZED LOGIN DETECTED!!! CLICK THE LINK BELOW IMMEDIATELY OR YOUR ACCOUNT WILL BE PERMANENTLY DELETED IN 1 HOUR!!!

subject: Google: Critical security alert for your account
body_text: Someone signed into your Google account from a new device in Russia. If this was not you confirm your password and recovery phone number immediately to secure your account.

subject: Wells Fargo: Unusual signin attempt detected
body_text: We noticed a suspicious signin attempt on your Wells Fargo account. Please verify your account details including your account number and PIN to confirm your identity.

subject: Your Amazon order has shipped
body_text: Hi Luella, Great news! Your order #112-3456789 has shipped and is on its way. Your estimated delivery date is Thursday May 22. You can track your package using the link below.

subject: Meeting reminder: Team standup tomorrow at 9am
body_text: Hi team, Just a reminder that we have our weekly standup tomorrow at 9:00 AM. Please come prepared to share your updates for the week. The meeting link is in your calendar invite.

subject: Your monthly bank statement is ready
body_text: Your Chase bank statement for April 2025 is now available. Log in to chase.com to view your statement. If you have any questions contact us at 1-800-935-9935.

subject: LinkedIn: John Doe wants to connect with you
body_text: Hi Luella, John Doe who works at Acme Corp wants to connect with you on LinkedIn. John and you both know Sarah Johnson. Accept or ignore this invitation.

subject: Your Dropbox document was updated
body_text: Hi Luella, Sarah Johnson edited Q3_Report_Final.docx in your shared Dropbox folder. You can view the latest version by opening Dropbox.

subject: GitHub: Your pull request was merged
body_text: Your pull request #42 'Fix authentication bug' was merged into main by @teamlead. View the diff and leave any final comments at the link below.

subject: Receipt for your Netflix subscription
body_text: Hi Luella, Thank you for your payment of $15.49 for your Standard Netflix plan. This is your receipt for billing period May 1 2025 to June 1 2025.

subject: Zoom: Your recording is ready to view
body_text: Hi Luella, Your Zoom cloud recording from the Team Meeting on May 15 is now available. You can view or download the recording for the next 30 days.

subject: Your flight itinerary - Confirmation AA1234
body_text: Your American Airlines booking is confirmed. Flight AA1234 Dallas to San Antonio on June 3 2025. Please check in online 24 hours before your departure.

subject: Slack: You have 3 unread messages
body_text: Hi Luella, You have unread messages waiting in your Slack workspace. Sarah sent you a direct message and there are 2 mentions in the general channel.

subject: IT Help Desk: Your ticket #4521 has been resolved
body_text: Hi Luella, Your IT support ticket #4521 regarding VPN access has been resolved. If you still experience issues please reply to this email or open a new ticket at the help desk portal.

subject: Google Workspace: Storage usage summary
body_text: Hi Luella, Your Google Workspace storage usage for May 2025 is 4.2 GB of 30 GB used. No action is required. You can manage your storage at any time from your account settings.

subject: Your DocuSign document has been completed
body_text: All parties have signed the NDA for the Vendor Agreement. The completed document has been saved and a copy has been emailed to all signers. View the completed document anytime on DocuSign.

subject: Payroll: Direct deposit notification
body_text: Hi Luella, Your direct deposit of $2847.50 has been processed and will be available in your account by Friday May 23. View your pay stub and deductions in the employee portal.

subject: Microsoft 365: Your password change was successful
body_text: Hi Luella, Your Microsoft 365 account password was changed successfully on May 15 2025. If you did not make this change contact your IT administrator immediately.

subject: Apple: Your order is on its way
body_text: Hi Luella, Your Apple AirPods order is on the way and will arrive by Tuesday May 20. Your tracking number is 1Z999AA10123456784. Track your delivery using the link below.

subject: FedEx: Package delivered
body_text: Hi Luella, Your package was delivered to your front door at 2:47 PM on May 20 2025. If you have any questions about your delivery please contact FedEx Customer Service.

subject: Webinar: Register for our free security training
body_text: Hi Luella, You are invited to join our free cybersecurity awareness webinar on June 5 at 2 PM CT. Topics include phishing awareness social engineering and password security. Register using the link below.

subject: Your insurance renewal is coming up
body_text: Hi Luella, Your renters insurance policy renews on June 30 2025. Your annual premium is $186.00 with no changes to your coverage. No action is required unless you wish to make changes.

subject: IT Security: Mandatory security awareness training due
body_text: Hi Luella, Your annual security awareness training is due by May 31 2025. This training is mandatory for all staff. Please complete it using your company SSO login at the link below.
